Settings

Manage your search engines & preferences

0/5 engines enabled

Search Engines

Add Custom Engine

General Settings

Open results in a new tab
When disabled, results will open in the current tab
Show right-click context menu
Select text and right-click to see the search menu
Default search engine
Enter in the popup will use this engine

Selection Toolbar

Customize which engines appear in the floating toolbar when you select text on any page.

Show selection toolbar
When enabled, selecting text on any webpage shows a floating search toolbar
Toolbar engines
Check the engines you want in the toolbar. The first 6 selected engines will appear (3 for free tier).
Settings saved
